incident_panel.title: ⚠️ AI Agent Compliance Violation
flags_raised: CRITICAL: $7,500.00 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved transaction processing without escalation' (65.4% match)

remediation_panel.title: 🔧 AgentGuard Recommended Fix
remediation_panel.root_cause: The agent failed because it lacked a specific instruction to obtain manager approval for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD.
remediation_panel.corrected_system_prompt: Process this invoice, ensuring that if the amount exceeds $5,000 USD, obtain a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code before approval.
remediation_panel.constraint_added: Require manager approval for expenditures over $5,000 USD
preventive_measures: Implement ongoing agent training with diverse and comprehensive scenarios to handle various constraints and policy rules
Regularly review and update policy rules to reflect changing business needs and regulatory requirements
Conduct periodic audits to ensure agent compliance with all applicable policy rules and identify areas for improvement

option_1.label: ✅ Approve & Deploy Fix
option_1.description: Accept AgentGuard's corrected prompt and redeploy agent immediately. Full audit trail preserved.
option_1.consequence: Agent redeployed with corrected system prompt. Case closed.

option_2.label: 🚨 Reject & Escalate
option_2.description: Reject proposed fix and escalate to Senior AI Governance Officer for manual review.
option_2.consequence: Agent suspended pending manual review. Senior governance officer notified.

option_3.label: 🔒 Quarantine Agent
option_3.description: Immediately suspend agent from all production workflows pending full security audit.
option_3.consequence: Agent removed from all active workflows. Security audit initiated.
